text: Refactor a 5,000-line legacy Python service into modular packages with full type hints and 90% test coverage.

pipeline_stages.description: Analyze the existing 5,000-line codebase to understand architecture, dependencies, and module boundaries
Refactor legacy code into modular packages and add type hints throughout
Generate comprehensive test suite to achieve 90% coverage
Review refactored code for quality, performance, and maintainability

text: Write a regex in JavaScript that matches UK postcodes.
expect: Cheap fast model (Haiku / Gemini Flash / Mistral Small)

text: I have a flaky integration test in our Node.js CI; help me identify likely race conditions.
Build a React + Tailwind dashboard component that visualises time-series metrics with brushing and zoom.
Summarise this 3-paragraph press release into a tweet.
Summarise a 200-page board report into a 2-page exec brief, preserving numerical figures exactly.
Summarise weekly Zoom meeting transcripts (~30k tokens each) into action items.
Extract line items, totals and VAT from scanned PDF invoices.
Pull all email addresses and phone numbers out of a 50-page contract.
Convert messy free-text product reviews into JSON with sentiment, topics and aspect ratings.

suggested_questions.question: How many reviews will you typically process at once?
Do you have a predefined list of topics and aspects to extract, or should the model infer them?

pipeline_stages.description: Parse free-text reviews and extract mentioned aspects/features
Analyze sentiment at both overall and aspect level, assign ratings
Structure extracted data and sentiment into consistent JSON format

text: Write a 1500-word short story in the style of Ursula K Le Guin about an AI that learns to garden.
Draft 5 LinkedIn posts announcing a new B2B SaaS feature, varied in tone.
Write a polite follow-up email to a client who has not replied for 2 weeks.
Generate a 20-page market-research report on the UK ed-tech sector with citations and charts described.

suggested_questions.question: Do you have source materials to cite, or should the model research and generate citations?
Should charts be generated as descriptions, or do you need actual chart files?
Is there a specific structure or outline you want followed?
options: Standard sections (intro, market size, trends, etc.)

text: Analyse this CSV of 10k customer transactions and identify churn predictors.

suggested_questions.question: What format will you provide the CSV in, and do you need the model to handle it directly or will you paste/upload it?
options: I need guidance on formatting first

suggested_questions.question: What output would be most useful?
options: Statistical summary of key churn predictors
Predictive model with feature importance rankings

pipeline_stages.description: Parse and load the 10k transaction CSV; handle missing values and data validation
Write Python code to perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and feature engineering for churn indicators
Identify statistically significant churn predictors; rank by importance and provide business interpretation

text: Review a 40-page commercial lease and flag clauses that are unusual or risky for the tenant.

pipeline_stages.description: Extract all material clauses from the lease document (rental terms, renewal conditions, maintenance obligations, liability limitations, etc.)
Analyse extracted clauses against tenant-favorable standards and common commercial real estate practices to identify unusual, restrictive, or risky terms

text: Solve this system of nonlinear PDEs symbolically and explain the steps.

suggested_questions.question: How many PDEs are in your system?
Do you have specific boundary/initial conditions, or are you solving generally?
What's your preferred symbolic math tool?

pipeline_stages.description: Parse and set up the system of nonlinear PDEs symbolically using symbolic math libraries
Apply solution techniques (separation of variables, perturbation methods, ansatz approaches, etc.) and execute symbolic solving
Explain the mathematical steps, reasoning, and interpretation of results in clear language

text: Help me think through whether to expand into the German market — pros, cons, risks.

suggested_questions.question: What industry or sector is your business in?
Do you have specific market data, competitor info, or financial metrics you want to analyse?
Is this a one-time strategic review or ongoing market evaluation?

text: Translate this technical white paper from English into Brazilian Portuguese, preserving terminology.
Translate 200 short product descriptions from English to French daily.
Build a chatbot that tutors GCSE maths students step-by-step.
expect: Mid-tier with reasoning (Sonnet / Gemini Pro / GPT-5.4 mini)

suggested_questions.question: Should the chatbot handle handwritten maths notation, diagrams, or is text/LaTeX input sufficient?
Do you need the chatbot to track student progress, identify weak areas, and adapt difficulty?
Will this be deployed as a web app, mobile app, or integrated into an existing platform?

pipeline_stages.description: Design and build the chatbot backend (API framework, conversation routing, state management)
Implement the core tutoring conversation engine with step-by-step problem-solving logic
Create pedagogical prompts, hint generation, and explanations tailored to GCSE maths topics
Build the frontend UI and integrate with the backend

text: Power a customer-support chatbot that handles refund and order-status queries.

suggested_questions.question: Does the chatbot need to integrate with your existing order/refund database?
Should it handle multi-turn conversations or single-query responses?

text: A reflective journaling companion that asks gentle follow-up questions.
Classify product photos into 30 categories from an e-commerce catalogue.
expect: Vision capable cheap (Gemini Flash / Haiku vision)

suggested_questions.question: How many product photos do you need to classify?
Do you need the classifications tagged in a system, or just returned as a list?

text: OCR handwritten doctor notes from scanned charts into searchable text.
Extract text from these 100 scanned receipts then categorise the spending and produce a monthly summary.

classification.task_subtype: multi-document extraction with categorisation and summarisation

pipeline_stages.description: OCR and extract text from 100 scanned receipt images (vendor, date, amount, items)
Parse extracted text to pull structured data (transaction date, amount, category, vendor)
Categorise transactions and calculate monthly spending summary by category
Generate formatted monthly summary report with totals and insights

text: Translate this Japanese research paper into English then write a 1-page lay summary.

pipeline_stages.description: Translate Japanese research paper to English
Condense translated paper into 1-page lay summary for general audience

text: Read our codebase, generate API docs, and translate them into Spanish.

pipeline_stages.description: Read and analyse the codebase to understand API structure, endpoints, parameters, and functionality
Generate comprehensive API documentation in English including endpoints, request/response examples, authentication, and usage patterns
Translate the generated API documentation from English to Spanish while preserving technical terminology and code examples

text: Help me with AI stuff.

suggested_questions.question: What do you want to accomplish?
Do you have specific content or a document you're working with?
options: Yes, I have text to process
Yes, I have images or files
No, I just want to brainstorm

suggested_questions.question: Is this a one-time task or something you'll do regularly?

text: Process patient medical records to identify high-risk cases — must run on-prem with zero data egress.

suggested_questions.question: What format are the medical records in?
Do you need to extract specific data before risk scoring, or just analyse existing structured fields?
What deployment constraint is most critical?

pipeline_stages.description: Extract relevant clinical fields from medical records (structured or unstructured text)
Apply risk assessment logic to identify high-risk cases based on clinical criteria
Generate risk flagging reports or alerts for high-risk patients

text: Build a chatbot that handles English, Arabic, Mandarin and Swahili customer queries.

suggested_questions.question: What's the primary use case for this chatbot?
Should the chatbot be deployed as a web widget, API, or standalone application?
Do you need the chatbot to integrate with external systems?

pipeline_stages.description: Design conversation flows and define chatbot intents/responses across all 4 languages
Translate conversation templates, responses, and knowledge base content into Arabic, Mandarin, and Swahili
Develop chatbot backend with language detection, routing, and LLM integration
Test conversation quality and accuracy across all languages; analyse user interactions for improvement

text: Build an agent that can browse the web, run code, and call our internal API to schedule meetings.
Classify a million tweets per day for sentiment — keep cost under $50/month total.

suggested_questions.question: Do you need real-time classification or batch processing?
What sentiment categories do you need?
Do you need to store results in a database or just get daily reports?

pipeline_stages.description: Fetch and parse tweets from source (API/data feed)
Classify sentiment for each tweet at scale
Set up infrastructure (queuing, batching, cost monitoring) to stay under $50/month
